name: Island Treasure Chase
short_description: We explore the pirate island searching for treasures and trying to escape from skeletons.
detailed_description:
Island Treasure Chase is an exciting adventure game set on a pirate-themed island. In the game, you explore the mysterious Island in search of hidden treasures while trying to escape from skeletons that guard the land. As you navigate through the island's dark jungles, eerie caves, and dangerous cliffs, each treasure you find brings you closer to victory, but also increases the number of skeletons chasing you.

The game’s atmosphere draws you into the cursed pirate island, testing your strategy and quick thinking skills. Will you manage to find the treasures and escape the island, or will you become one of the lost souls?

In Island Treasure Chase, explore the island, gather treasures, and escape the skeletons!
